caption: Figure 3.1.1: Status of operations during each survey phase (%)
description: A stacked bar chart showing the percentage of MSMEs in four operational statuses (Working as usual, Temporarily closed, Business premises still open but reduced operations, Business premises closed to customers but some business operations continue) across four time periods: Lockdown Period, July 2020, October 2020, and January 2021. The percentage of businesses 'Working as usual' increases from 30% during lockdown to 85% in January 2021.
